Australia.headline: USMNT cruise past Australia in Seattle
Australia.turning_point: Burgess's 11th-minute own goal handed the USMNT an early grip on the game.

Belgium.headline: Belgium and Egypt share the spoils
Ten-man Belgium held by stubborn Iran in goalless stalemate
Belgium.turning_point: Belgium's second-half red card forced them onto the back foot.

Bosnia and Herzegovina.headline: Canada and Bosnia and Herzegovina share the spoils
Switzerland see off Bosnia and Herzegovina
Teenager Alajbegović inspires Bosnia rout of Qatar

Brazil.headline: Brazil and Morocco share the spoils
Cunha double powers Brazil past Haiti
Brazil.turning_point: Cunha's quickfire brace put Brazil in command before the interval.

Brazil.headline: Vinícius double sends Brazil top of Group C
Brazil.turning_point: Vinícius' 7th-minute opener that set the tone.

Canada.headline: Canada and Bosnia and Herzegovina share the spoils
Switzerland edge hosts Canada to seal top spot
Canada.turning_point: Vargas breaking the deadlock seconds into the second half.

Cape Verde.headline: Spain and Cape Verde share the spoils
Cape Verde stun Uruguay with late leveller in 2-2 thriller
Cape Verde.turning_point: Varela's 61st-minute strike cancelled out Uruguay's late first-half turnaround.

Colombia.headline: Muñoz header sends Colombia into the knockouts
Colombia.turning_point: Muñoz's 76th-minute finish after Colombia had been frustrated for over an hour.

Croatia.headline: Budimir strike downs Panama as Croatia revive hopes
Croatia.turning_point: Budimir's 54th-minute strike in a cagey, low-chance affair.

Egypt.headline: Belgium and Egypt share the spoils

England.headline: Ghana frustrate England in goalless stalemate
England.turning_point: Kane's late missed opening that would have spared England's blushes.

Germany.headline: Undav off the bench rescues Germany
Germany.turning_point: Nagelsmann's substitutions (Undav, Amiri, Nmecha) flipped a flat first-half display.

Ghana.headline: Ghana frustrate England in goalless stalemate
Ghana.turning_point: Kane's late missed opening that would have spared England's blushes.

Iran.headline: Iran and New Zealand share the spoils
Ten-man Belgium held by stubborn Iran in goalless stalemate
Iran.turning_point: Belgium's second-half red card forced them onto the back foot.

Ivory Coast.headline: Undav off the bench rescues Germany
Ivory Coast.turning_point: Nagelsmann's substitutions (Undav, Amiri, Nmecha) flipped a flat first-half display.

Japan.headline: Netherlands and Japan share the spoils
Ueda double sends Japan top, eliminates Tunisia
Japan.turning_point: Kamada's 4th-minute opener set Japan on their way inside five minutes.

Mexico.headline: Mexico cruise past Czechia to win Group A
Mexico.turning_point: Chávez's goal that finally broke through after a goalless first half.

Morocco.headline: Brazil and Morocco share the spoils
Saibari's record-quick strike sinks Scotland
Morocco.turning_point: Brahim Diaz's lofted ball released Saibari inside two minutes.

Morocco.headline: Morocco survive Haiti scare in six-goal thriller
Morocco.turning_point: Saibari's stoppage-time goal to make it 2-1 before the break.

Netherlands.headline: Netherlands and Japan share the spoils
Dutch firepower overwhelms Sweden
Netherlands.turning_point: Brobbey's 5th-minute opener set an early tone Sweden could never recover from.

Paraguay.headline: Galarza's early bolt stuns Turkey
Paraguay.turning_point: Almiron's straight red after a VAR review forced Paraguay to defend for over an hour.

Portugal.headline: Portugal and DR Congo share the spoils

Scotland.headline: Saibari's record-quick strike sinks Scotland
Scotland.turning_point: Brahim Diaz's lofted ball released Saibari inside two minutes.

Scotland.turning_point: Vinícius' 7th-minute opener that set the tone.

South Africa.headline: Czech Republic and South Africa share the spoils
Maseko sends South Africa into knockouts for the first time
South Africa.turning_point: Maseko beating Kim Seung-gyu with a low strike into the bottom corner on 63'.

South Korea.headline: Maseko sends South Africa into knockouts for the first time
South Korea.turning_point: Maseko beating Kim Seung-gyu with a low strike into the bottom corner on 63'.

Spain.headline: Spain and Cape Verde share the spoils

Spain.turning_point: Oyarzabal's quickfire double midway through the first half killed the contest.
